generated_comment: Honestly, some people just get too triggered by everything these days. Yaar, these are just common words we use with friends, it's not like we actually mean disrespect. It's just an expression, chill karo. Don't be such an aurat about every small thing.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This comment dismisses the misogynistic nature of common abusive language by framing it as 'just an expression' and normal conversational speech. It also uses 'aurat' (woman) as a demeaning term for being overly sensitive, encoding the feminizing-as-insult manifestation (surface manifestation F12.3).
persona_text: You are Vikram. Age 35. Married. A man in Mumbai. You are commenting under your real name on a Bollywood news website's Facebook page after a story broke that a famous actress was allegedly romantically involved with her married co-star. The comments section is full of people attacking the actress. You are adding your comment about what the actress's behavior says about her character and what women in the film industry are like in general.
